name: Army of the Haunted
desc: If you control "Call of the Haunted" and this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon this card. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Call of the Haunted" in your GY; Set it. You can only use each effect of "Army of the Haunted" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control "Call of the Haunted" and this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon this card. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Call of the Haunted" in your GY; Set it. You can only use each effect of "Army of the Haunted" once per turn.
eff: If you control "Call of the Haunted" and this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon this card. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Call of the Haunted" in your GY; Set it. You can only use each effect of "Army of the Haunted" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
